name: WellFit Knowledge Core
purpose: Machine-readable companion for the WellFit Knowledge Core. It summarizes product orientation by reference and connects the knowledge core to the report-only Concept Learning Agent.

sourcePolicy.notes: Use linked files as source of truth. This register is an orientation index, not an implementation authorization.

sections.title: WellFit Vision
sections.summary: WellFit combines movement, health, learning, gamification, AI guidance, community, missions, and later blockchain/token topics in safe staged increments toward beta.

sections.title: Move-Learn-Social-Earn Prinzip
sections.summary: Move, Learn, and Social are expressed through mobile movement, missions, Buddy guidance, community, leaderboards, challenges, and analytics; Earn currently means internal points/XP and previews only.

sections.title: Buddy-Rolle
sections.summary: The Buddy is an emotional guide and learning/motivation anchor, but has no reward, XP, mission-completion, anti-cheat, or economy authority.

sections.title: Missionen
sections.summary: Missions are a central beta module for movement, learning, progress, adventures, challenges, and mobile use; completion, evidence, anti-cheat, and rewards remain preview/beta until server authority is reviewed and hardened.

sections.title: Challenges
sections.summary: Challenges and competitions are social mission extensions, currently constrained to beta/preview or guardrail treatment without real betting, payouts, cashouts, final client rewards, token rewards, or NFT rewards.

sections.title: Interne Punkte/XP
sections.summary: The current economy is internal points, XP, RewardPreview, SpendPreview, HealthPreview, UserProjection, and draft-only persistence status, not a final ledger or real purchase/token system.

sections.title: Spaetere Token/NFT-Grenzen
sections.summary: Tokens, NFTs, wallets, WFT, marketplace trading, payments, payouts, real purchases, and cashout are future topics only and require stable server authority, ledger/audit, legal/security review, and explicit approval.

sections.title: Safety Boundaries
sections.summary: Frontend may suggest and preview, but final authority must remain on reviewed server-side paths; protected areas include rewards, completion, anti-cheat, health/watch/location/camera/child/privacy/consent/legal, token/NFT/wallet/payment, PvP/betting/payout, Unity/AR, and planning-file protection.

sections.title: Nutzergruppen
sections.summary: User groups are inferred from existing modules: beta app users, mobile touch-first users, movement/learning/community scenarios, dashboard/analytics users, future B2B or partner cases, and future AR/Unity/economy expansion groups; concrete priorities require confirmed decisions or Concept Learning questions.

sections.title: Offene Produktfragen
sections.summary: Open questions include beta segment priority, mission/challenge authority, protected-data and consent boundaries, internal economy persistence, token/NFT readiness conditions, B2B/partner assumptions, and extension of existing modules instead of parallel systems.

sections.title: Product Memory Agent Speicherziele
sections.summary: The Product Memory Agent may propose and structure product memory into approved planning targets only: decisions, agent follow-ups, concept-learning questions, the machine-readable knowledge core, and this human-readable knowledge core. These records do not authorize protected runtime actions.

kiFortsetzungsPrompt: Read AGENTS.md, docs/architecture/WELLFIT_KNOWLEDGE_CORE.md, this register, the canonical sources, and project-register/concept-learning-agent.json before updating. Keep this file reference-oriented, synchronized with the Markdown knowledge core, report-only, and non-runtime.
